summary: Add outline rail and guard huge JSONL opens
description: Make the right rail useful with a navigation/outline/chapter panel under the calendar, and prevent Mega Vault Viewer from freezing/crashing when opening large structured files like records/sources.jsonl by avoiding full raw rendering.
acceptance: Right rail renders calendar plus outline/navigation panel for current document; large JSON/JSONL/YAML files open as bounded previews with file-size warning rather than full source dump; sources.jsonl-sized fixture does not put full content into VaultItemView.source/formatted; UI remains Obsidian-clean.
verification: cargo test -p mvv-core large_structured; npm --workspace apps/desktop run build; npm run check; browser DOM/vision smoke

evidence.summary: Added right-rail document outline under calendar; large structured files now open/search-index as bounded previews instead of full raw loads; active records/sources.jsonl is 236M/87555 lines; regression large_structured_files_open_as_bounded_previews passes; npm run check and go validate pass.
